## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guide in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove the fix/feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally (`make test`).
- [ ] Linters pass (`make lint`).
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings.
- [ ] I have **not** committed any secrets, `.env` values, or model weights.
